device_type.title: Select Device Type
device_type.description: Select whether your device is a Blue Connect Go or Blue Connect Plus. Only the Plus model has salinity and conductivity sensors.

fit50.title: Fit50 Adapter Configuration
fit50.description: Is your Blue Connect Device installed with a Fit50 accessory on the circulation pipe?

pump_entity.title: Select Circulation Pump Entity
pump_entity.description: Select the switch or binary_sensor entity reflecting the state of your circulation pump. Measurement will be taken at selected regular interval only when the circulation pump is running.

device_name.title: Name Your Device
device_name.description: Enter a name for this device.

init.title: Configure BlueConnect Device
init.description: Update device type, name, and Fit50 adapter settings. Changes will take effect after reloading the integration.
